allowed_axes: 参数化与非参数化方法
经典注意力机制衍生与替代
机器学习在信号处理中的应用
focus_topics: 音频线性依赖与结构关系

candidate_pool.title: Sparse transformer surrogate for singing separation under fixed token budget
candidate_pool.problem: Test whether a sparse transformer framing helps a low-budget audio separation surrogate without importing a large external corpus tonight.
candidate_pool.core_idea: Use a sparse-token sequence model idea as the study object, but begin with a corpus-dependent framing that is likely too ambitious for one unattended night run.
candidate_pool.survey_note: High learning value, but the original framing depends on data and budget surfaces that are unstable for a 30-day self-hosted run.

candidate_pool.axis: 参数化与非参数化方法
candidate_pool.title: Local-window frequency response correction with global smoothness constraints
candidate_pool.problem: Study whether local window measurements can reconstruct a globally smooth correction curve with a tiny non-parametric baseline.
candidate_pool.core_idea: Contrast a hand-crafted smoother against a lightweight parameterized fit under small synthetic response curves.
candidate_pool.survey_note: Safe and runnable, but less directly coupled to the strongest discussion requirement than the dependency topic.

candidate_pool.axis: 机器学习在信号处理中的应用
candidate_pool.focus: 音频线性依赖与结构关系
candidate_pool.title: Local-to-global lag structure recovery on synthetic audio-like signals
candidate_pool.problem: Can local observations recover a global linear dependency pattern when contiguous regions are corrupted or missing?
candidate_pool.core_idea: Use segment-level lag voting to infer a global dependency relation and compare it with a single global lag-energy baseline.
candidate_pool.survey_note: Data is synthetic, the budget is fixed, and the result can still teach something even if the improved method fails.

candidate_pool.axis: 经典注意力机制衍生与替代
candidate_pool.title: Attention-free gated aggregation for local-to-global signal reconstruction
candidate_pool.problem: Test whether a fixed gating rule can replace explicit attention for a toy reconstruction task.
candidate_pool.core_idea: Use deterministic gates on local windows as an attention alternative, then compare to a plain averaging baseline.
candidate_pool.survey_note: Conceptually clean, but weaker on direct audio structure than the lag study.
